title: VoteEnvelope
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 15.3 (the most safety-critical entity in PACK-03; ADR-005 consolidation into voting-service). Owned by voting-service (epd2_voting_service.domain.VoteEnvelope). additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing vote-linkability control (CT-00-09, canon section 15.3's 'Запрет'): account_id, person_id, identity_record_id, full_name, email, membership_id, and identity_provider_reference are all forbidden and cannot appear on an instance that validates against this schema (epd2_voting_service.domain.FORBIDDEN_FIELD_NAMES). `credential_proof` references an opaque ParticipationCredential.credential_id, never an account_id - no code path anywhere resolves a VoteEnvelope back to an Account/IdentityRecord.
